title: August 2025 Partnership & Push-In Ceremony
excerpt: Filer Rural Fire District welcomed a new apparatus with a traditional push-in ceremony, celebrating our ongoing partnership with the community.

title: 2025 EMS Quick Response Unit Update
excerpt: Our EMS division received a new Quick Response Unit, improving response times across the district.

title: July 4th 2025 Tanker Deployment
excerpt: District crews were on standby with a tanker unit throughout the July 4th holiday weekend to protect the community during elevated fire risk conditions.
